overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic covered plaza with teal architecture and a large Kiroshi billboard, then turning left into a dark highway underpass with concrete pillars and passing vehicles. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics with neon signage and mixed natural-artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial plaza with teal architectural arch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza toward the large Kiroshi digital billboard

entered.detail: large turquoise architectural archway forming the entrance to the covered plaza
massive horizontal digital screen displaying anime-style characters with 'KIROSHI' text
wide concrete steps leading up into the plaza area
bright yellow seating structures flanking the plaza entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic covered plaza characterized by distinctive teal architectural elements. A massive digital billboard for 'Kiroshi' dominates the view ahead, displaying animated cyberpunk-style characters. The area is relatively quiet with sparse pedestrian activity, featuring yellow benches and clean paved surfaces under a partially covered roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass entrance with pedestrian walkway

events.description: exits the covered plaza and turns left into the dimly lit highway underpass
completes left turn to follow the sidewalk parallel to the road under the overpass

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the plaza and entering the highway underpass alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead casting deep shadows on the walkway
thick brutalist concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway
tall digital advertisement screen with red neon lighting on the building wall
multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles passing under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bright plaza into a dark, enclosed highway underpass. The environment shifts dramatically to brutalist concrete architecture with massive support pillars and a road with passing vehicles to the left. A red vertical billboard provides neon illumination on the wall as the character joins the flow of pedestrians walking through the covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: futuristic sedan and other vehicles pass by on the road to the left
light increases ahead as the end of the underpass tunnel approaches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the highway overpass, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction wearing an orange top
pedestrian with backpack walking ahead in the underpass

entered.detail: bright daylight visible at the far end of the underpass tunnel
circular neon signage visible in the distance on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the extended highway underpass, surrounded by concrete pillars and the overhead road structure. Other pedestrians walk in the same direction along the narrow sidewalk while vehicles pass on the adjacent road. The scene gradually brightens as the tunnel exit approaches in the distance, with neon signage visible on the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, futuristic plaza into the oppressive depths of a brutalist highway underpass. It begins by walking through a covered area defined by teal architectural elements and a massive, animated Kiroshi digital billboard overlooking clean paved surfaces and yellow benches. As the character moves forward, the open brightness of the plaza shifts dramatically into a dark, enclosed underpass characterized by massive concrete support pillars and the roar of passing vehicles. The scene then extends through this narrow walkway, where red neon signage illuminates the concrete walls and the character joins a flow of pedestrians. Finally, the environment gradually brightens as the camera continues forward toward the distant tunnel exit.
